name_en: Exclusive Real Photos M24996 Screen Print (Surfing) This Christopher Medium Backpack uses Monogram Surfin' canvas inspired by Pharrell Williams, interpreting the inspiration of a rucksack. Surfboards and floral elements construct an intricate overlapping pattern, highlighting a retro atmosphere with vibrant tones. The close-fitting silhouette includes ample space, with compartments and side pockets. Dimensions: 38x44x12.5cm
